core_concept: 一個被刪除的恐怖故事中，Jeff the Killer 的陰森場景
composition_hint: 將螢幕與陰影對比強調，突出虛空網頁與錯誤訊息的中心位置
potential_subjects: A flickering screen displaying a deleted page warning
A shadowy figure lingering in the digital void
A corrupted webpage with glitching text
original_excerpt:
Jeff the Killer has been deleted as per Quality Control via
Community Decision
. You can still read it
here
.
For the versions available on this wiki, check out
the Banning rewrite
or
the Shadowswimmer rewrite
.
You may also be looking for:
Jeff Is Back
Jeff
Go to Sleep
Jane the Killer
For a list of popular deleted pages, click
here
.
